title: quickstart.md E2E sweep against 3-peer fixture

doc_drift.issue: get audit subcommand doesn't carry --since / --limit flags; only events does
doc_drift.note: Documented as small refactor follow-up in commit 18d7b48; doesn't affect binary surface

doc_drift.issue: Verifier checked for gzip magic; --output - emits raw tar (no gzip) per design

summary: Every documented pgmctl command runs against the live rig and returns a meaningful exit code per FR-037. The 3 fixture-aware passes (exit 2 / 3) correctly reflect node-b being in failed state. No actual binary defects surfaced.
